AboutFounders.title: The People Behind It All
AboutFounders.subtitle: Two founders, one obsession: building websites that actually work for your business.
storyParagraphs: We are Fernanda and Orr, the founders of <bold>SkyEdge4K</bold>. We are partners in both business and life.

Our journey began with a shared passion for creativity, design, and building meaningful connections. As a couple, we decided to turn that passion into a business that helps other businesses grow online.

We started our journey in Colombia, and along the way our work took us to the United States and Mexico, where we had the opportunity to collaborate with entrepreneurs from different industries and cultures.

Today, we are excited to begin a new chapter in Israel, where our focus is dedicated to building modern, high-performing websites. We create websites that are beautiful, fast, mobile-friendly, and designed to help businesses attract more customers and grow with confidence.

<bold>SkyEdge4K</bold> reflects who we are: a couple that combines creativity, technical expertise, and a genuine passion for helping businesses succeed. We believe every business has a unique story, and we're here to bring it to life through exceptional web design.

FaqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FaqSection.description: Have questions about SkyEdge4K.studio? Here are the most common answers about our landing pages, business websites, and online stores.

items.question: Do you use platforms like WordPress or Wix?
items.answer: No. At SkyEdge4K.studio, we build every website using real code (Next.js, React, and Tailwind). That means faster load times, clean semantic structure, no platform limitations, and 100% ownership of your site, with no monthly fees or templates.

items.question: Can you help my business appear on Google?
items.answer: Yes! Every website we build starts with clean, well-structured code that gives you a strong technical foundation from day one.

items.question: What makes your websites faster than others?
items.answer: Our sites are fully coded without unnecessary plugins or heavy themes. We optimize images, use server-side rendering, and follow best coding practices to achieve lightning-fast performance and top Google PageSpeed scores.

items.question: Do I need to pay a monthly fee after the site is done?
items.answer: No monthly platform fees! You pay once for development and you own your website forever. We can provide optional maintenance, but ownership remains 100% yours.

items.question: Do you offer ready-made templates or only custom designs?
items.answer: Both! Choose one of our own premium, in-house templates for a faster launch, or go fully custom if you want something built from scratch. Either way, the code quality is the same.

items.question: How long does it take to build a website?
items.answer: It depends on complexity, but most websites take between 2–5 weeks. During this time, we design, develop, optimize, and test everything so your site launches perfectly and ready to perform.
